recommendations.title: Steins;Gate: The Movie - Load Region of Déjà Vu
recommendations.overview: One year after the events of the anime, Rintarou begins to feel the repercussions of extensive time travel, and eventually completely fades from reality. Kurisu, being the only companion to remember him, now must find a way to bring him back.
recommendations.director: Hiroshi Hamasaki, Takuya Sato, Kanji Wakabayashi

recommendations.title: Along Came the Devil
recommendations.overview: After a troubled childhood, Ashley searches for a connection, and unknowingly invites in a demonic force, which leaves her loved ones fighting for her soul.

recommendations.title: ChromeSkull: Laid to Rest 2
recommendations.overview: After his gruesome encounter with a girl, and being outmatched by his own assistant, ChromeSkull resurges with a horrifying massacre of his own.

recommendations.title: Skinamarink
recommendations.overview: Two children wake up in the middle of the night to find their father is missing, and all the windows and doors in their home have vanished.

recommendations.overview: On a hot summer day in Oslo, the dead mysteriously awaken, and three families are thrown into chaos when their deceased loved ones come back to them. Who are they, and what do they want?

recommendations.title: Weapons
recommendations.overview: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.
